name: Terminal paste fix + CI hotfix

issues.title: Bug: Ctrl+V double-pastes in terminal — custom keydown handler and xterm native paste event both write to PTY

note: Originally planned as a 7-issue 'Terminal polish' bundle. Trimmed to ship the paste fix immediately while build verification is blocked by Windows-Defender on the user's local .pnpm store. Issues #156-#161 carry over to v0.5.4. Also bundles the clippy `unused_mut` CI hotfix in github.rs (latent since #121, surfaced when PR CI first fired) and a cure of the version drift in tauri.conf.json / Cargo.toml / package.json / plugin.json (had been pinned at 0.5.0 since the v0.5.0 release).
